Operation 'translateText' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks critical details about inputs (array of text objects, optional source language), outputs (returns translations for each target), and key capabilities (auto-detection, multiple targets). Enhanced version clarifies what the operation accepts and returns, making it more actionable for AI agents. Summary improved to indicate multiple target language support.

data.current_description: Translates text from one language to one or more other languages.
data.summary_suggestion: Translate text to one or more target languages
data.description_suggestion: Translates input text from a source language to one or more target languages. Accepts an array of text objects and supports automatic language detection if source language is not specified. Returns translation results for each target language, including the translated text and detected source language. Supports optional parameters for text type, profanity handling, and formatting preservation.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about inputs (array of text objects, optional source language), outputs (returns translations for each target), and key capabilities (auto-detection, multiple targets). Enhanced version clarifies what the operation accepts and returns, making it more actionable for AI agents. Summary improved to indicate multiple target language support.

message: Operation 'detectLanguage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too vague about what is returned. Enhanced version specifies that it returns language code and confidence score, clarifies input format (array of text objects), and explains the practical use case. This helps AI agents understand both the operation's mechanics and when to invoke it.

data.current_description: Identifies the language of a piece of text.
data.description_suggestion: Detects the language of input text and returns the identified language code along with a confidence score. Accepts an array of text objects. Returns language detection results including the detected language code and confidence value for each input text. Useful for determining text language before translation or other language-specific operations.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about what is returned. data.current_description: Gets the set of languages currently supported by other operations of the Translator.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete set of languages supported by the Translator service. Returns language information organized by scope (translation, transliteration, dictionary). Use this operation to discover available languages before performing translation, transliteration, or dictionary operations.

data.current_description: Converts text in one language from one script to another script.
data.description_suggestion: Converts text from one script to another script within the same language. Accepts an array of text objects and requires specification of the language and source/target scripts. Returns transliterated text maintaining the original language but using the target script. Useful for converting between scripts (e.g., Arabic to Latin characters, Cyrillic to Latin).

data.current_description: Identifies the positioning of sentence boundaries in a piece of text.
data.description_suggestion: Identifies sentence boundaries in input text and returns the character positions where sentences begin and end. Accepts an array of text objects and an optional language parameter. Returns an array of sentence boundary positions for each input text. Useful for preprocessing text before translation or for text analysis tasks that require sentence-level segmentation.
